attrs.goal: Log into Pleasur.AI with the saved session. Open the AI Companion Creator at /create. Pick the Realistic template. Move through the wizard to the personality and backstory step. Capture that screen with the form fields visible.

attrs.goal: Log into Pleasur.AI with the saved session. Open an existing character chat. Type the message "Send me a selfie" and send it. Wait for the AI to generate and return an image inline in the chat thread. Capture the full chat window showing the generated character image appearing as a message within the conversation.
attrs.what: In-chat image generation — character-consistent selfie returned inline inside the conversation

visuals.alt: In-chat image generation — character-consistent selfie returned inline inside the conversation
